results.name: gives poisonous
results.description: Gives a creature the ability to give a set amount of poison counters to opponents upon combat damage, like the poisonous keyword

results.name: gives pp counters to all
results.description: Put +1/+1 counters on all of your creatures.

results.name: gives stalking
results.description: Cards that make creatures only be blockable by no more than one creature, also known as "[stalking](stalking)".

results.name: gives unstoppable
results.description: Make your creatures assign combat damage as though they weren't blocked. See also [unstoppable](unstoppable).

results.name: gixian
results.description: [Gix](Gix)'s disciples were a cult that used Phyrexian technology to replace flesh body parts with metal.

results.name: glasses
results.description: A vision-correcting apparatus comprised of two lenses, held in front of the eyes by a compact frame which commonly rests on the nose and ears. 👓
